name: Death Blow and Curse Luck Scaling
description:
Adds Luck-based scaling to the Death Blow and Curse attacks of Black Knights and Dread Knights.

This module gives **Black Knights** a new chance to trigger **Death Blow** when they have positive Luck. Their existing **Curse** attack is also adjusted by Luck. **Dread Knights** keep both of their existing attacks, with both **Death Blow** and **Curse** modified by positive and negative Luck.

## Creature Changes

* **Black Knight** — gains a chance to trigger **Death Blow** only with positive Luck, while its existing **Curse** attack is adjusted by Luck.
  * **+1 Luck**: 7% Death Blow chance.
  * **+2 Luck**: 14% Death Blow chance.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: 20% Death Blow chance.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: Curse chance is reduced by 10%.
  * **-2 Luck**: Curse chance is reduced by 7%.
  * **-1 Luck**: Curse chance is reduced by 3%.
  * **+1 Luck**: Curse chance is increased by an additional 10%.
  * **+2 Luck**: Curse chance is increased by an additional 20%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: Curse chance is increased by an additional 30%.

* **Dread Knight** — keeps its existing **Death Blow** and **Curse** attacks, with both chances adjusted by Luck.
  * **-3 or lower Luck**: Death Blow and Curse chances are reduced by 10%.
  * **-2 Luck**: Death Blow and Curse chances are reduced by 7%.
  * **-1 Luck**: Death Blow and Curse chances are reduced by 3%.
  * **+1 Luck**: Death Blow and Curse chances are increased by an additional 10%.
  * **+2 Luck**: Death Blow and Curse chances are increased by an additional 20%.
  * **+3 or higher Luck**: Death Blow and Curse chances are increased by an additional 30%.
author: bew_
